profile.title: Profile & Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your profile and quit smoking journey
profile.relapseDesc: It takes many tries to quit for good. Don't see it as a failure, learn from triggers and start over immediately!

home.tipsBody: Cravings usually peak after 3-5 minutes and will disappear. When craving, switch to the Cravings tab to practice 4-7-8 deep breathing to soothe your nerves instantly.
home.setupQuitTime: When you smoked your last cigarette:
quotes: Every second you don't smoke is a victory for your lungs.
The money saved today will build your future tomorrow.
Take a deep breath. This fresh air belongs to you.
You are stronger than your cravings. Cravings only last 3-5 minutes!
Your family and loved ones are proud of your determination.
Value your own health. You deserve a healthy life.
Every cigarette refused is a step closer to freedom.

cravings.title: Cravings Support
cravings.subtitle: Overcome cravings with deep breathing or by logging triggers
cravings.breathingDesc: The 4-7-8 technique helps slow your heart rate, reduce stress, and beat cravings.
cravings.emptyLogs: No cravings recorded. Great! You are doing well.
cravings.notesPlaceholder: How are you feeling? Record it to track...
cravings.successAlertMsg: Craving recorded. Stay strong and overcome it!
cravings.deleteAlertMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this log?

discover.title: Discover Harms
discover.whyQuitBody1: Smoking causes a series of dangerous diseases: lung cancer, cardiovascular disease, stroke, and chronic respiratory diseases. Each cigarette you smoke is a step closer to these risks.
discover.whyQuitBody2: However, your body has an amazing ability to recover as soon as you stop smoking. Your journey starts today!

health.title: Health Recovery
health.subtitle: Scientific statistics on the body's biological recovery speed

milestones.title: Blood Pressure & Heart Rate
milestones.desc: Blood pressure and heart rate begin to return to normal. Extremities start to warm up.

milestones.title: Carbon Monoxide
milestones.desc: Toxic carbon monoxide levels in your blood are reduced by half. Oxygen levels return to normal.

milestones.title: CO Clearance
milestones.desc: Carbon monoxide is completely cleared from the body. Lungs begin self-cleaning of toxins and mucus.

milestones.title: Nicotine Clearance
milestones.desc: All nicotine is filtered out. Taste and smell start to sharpen, making food taste better.

milestones.title: Easier Breathing
milestones.desc: Bronchial tubes in the lungs begin to relax. Lung capacity increases, making deep breathing easier.

milestones.title: Circulation & Fitness
milestones.desc: Blood circulation improves throughout the body. Physical activities like walking or running start to feel easier.

milestones.title: Healthy Lung Function
milestones.desc: Lung filtration and oxygen absorption increase by up to 10%. Coughing and wheezing decrease significantly.

milestones.title: Reduced Heart Risk
milestones.desc: Risk of coronary heart disease and heart attack is reduced by half compared to when you smoked.

milestones.title: Stroke Prevention
milestones.desc: Stroke risk is significantly reduced, returning to a level comparable to a never-smoker.

milestones.title: Lung Cancer Prevention
milestones.desc: Risk of lung cancer death is reduced by half. Risk of throat and esophageal cancer also decreases significantly.
